name: schedule_task
description: Schedule a one-shot command to run at a specific time using 'at' daemon

action.description: Action: 'add' to schedule, 'list' to see pending, 'remove' to cancel

time_spec.description: When to run (e.g. 'now + 5 minutes', '10:30', 'midnight', 'noon tomorrow'). Use 'none' for list/remove.

command.description: Command to execute. For remove, use job number. Use 'none' for list.
